pure_tone.verdict: EML-3: one atom, one EML gate (exp → sin)

chord.verdict: EML-3: K atoms in parallel, depth stays 3

vibrato.verdict: EML-6: two nested sinusoids, depth doubles

am_synthesis.verdict: EML-4: product of two EML-3 signals adds one depth level

fm_synthesis.verdict: EML-5: phase argument composes two branches at depth 4 + outer sin

harmonic_series.verdict: EML-3: K harmonic atoms, same depth as pure tone — only breadth grows

wavetable.formula: W[phase(t)] where W is a lookup table
wavetable.verdict: EML-inf: arbitrary wavetable is not real-analytic (piecewise interpolation)

noise.verdict: EML-inf: white noise has infinitely many sign changes on every interval

pure_tone.verdict: EML-3: one atom, one EML gate (exp → sin)

chord.verdict: EML-3: K atoms in parallel, depth stays 3

vibrato.verdict: EML-6: two nested sinusoids, depth doubles

am_synthesis.verdict: EML-4: product of two EML-3 signals adds one depth level

fm_synthesis.verdict: EML-5: phase argument composes two branches at depth 4 + outer sin

harmonic_series.verdict: EML-3: K harmonic atoms, same depth as pure tone — only breadth grows

wavetable.formula: W[phase(t)] where W is a lookup table
wavetable.verdict: EML-inf: arbitrary wavetable is not real-analytic (piecewise interpolation)

noise.verdict: EML-inf: white noise has infinitely many sign changes on every interval

numerical.key_insight: ALL standard synthesized audio is finite-depth EML. The EML tree for a sound IS its synthesis formula. Depth hierarchy: pure tone (3) < AM (4) < FM (5) < vibrato (6). Chord/harmonic series stay at depth 3 regardless of how many partials — depth = tree height, not number of atoms. Only non-analytic signals (wavetable, noise) are EML-inf.

summary.title: Music & Signal Processing — EML Tones and Spectra

findings.name: Pure Tone = EML-3
findings.content: A*sin(2*pi*nu*t) is exactly depth 3: linear arg + exp (sin) + scale.

findings.name: Chord Depth Invariance
findings.content: A chord of K tones is EML-3 regardless of K. Number of atoms grows but tree height stays 3. This shows EML depth measures COMPOSITION not ADDITION.

findings.name: FM Synthesis Hierarchy
findings.content: AM (depth 4) < FM/vibrato (depth 5-6). Each frequency modulation layer adds 2-3 depth levels. Doubly-nested FM would reach depth 8-9.

findings.name: Noise = EML-inf
findings.content: White noise has infinite zero crossings on compact intervals. This is the audio instance of the Infinite Zeros Barrier. The EML complexity boundary in audio = analytic vs stochastic.

findings.name: Synthesis = EML Tree Construction
findings.content: Every synthesized audio algorithm IS an EML tree construction. The synthesis formula and the EML tree are the same object. Audio synthesis = EML programming.
